================================================================================
                     MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT
================================================================================

This MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT (the "MSA") is entered into on 15th March
2024, by and between:

GlobalTech Inc., a corporation organized under the laws of Delaware, USA,
having its principal place of business at 100 Innovation Drive, Wilmington,
Delaware (hereinafter "Company");

AND

DataServe India Private Limited, a company incorporated under the Companies
Act, 2013, having its registered office at 789, Electronic City, Bengaluru,
Karnataka 560100 (hereinafter "Service Provider").

================================================================================
1.  DEFINITIONS
================================================================================

"Affiliate" means any entity that directly or indirectly controls, is
controlled by, or is under common control with a party.

"Change of Control" means (a) the acquisition of a party by another entity
by way of merger, amalgamation, or consolidation; (b) the sale of all or
substantially all of the assets of a party; or (c) any change in the
beneficial ownership of more than fifty percent (50%) of the voting shares
of a party.

================================================================================
2.  CHANGE OF CONTROL
================================================================================

2.1 In the event of a Change of Control of the Service Provider, the Company
shall have the right to terminate this MSA immediately upon written notice.

2.2 In the event of a Change of Control of the Service Provider initiated by
the Service Provider's management, the Service Provider shall pay the Company
a change of control penalty of INR 5,00,00,000 (Rupees Five Crores only) as
liquidated damages.

2.3 The Company may also, at its sole discretion, assign this Agreement to
any successor entity in the event of a Change of Control.

================================================================================
3.  TERM AND RENEWAL
================================================================================

3.1 This MSA shall commence on the Effective Date and shall continue for an
initial term of three (3) years.

3.2 Thereafter, this MSA shall automatically renew for successive twelve-month
periods unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least
ninety (90) days prior to the end of the then-current term.

3.3 Upon each automatic renewal, the Service Provider's fees shall automatically
increase by twenty percent (20%) over the fees applicable during the preceding
term.

================================================================================
4.  TERMINATION
================================================================================

4.1 Either party may terminate this MSA upon a material breach by the other
party that remains uncured for thirty (30) days after written notice.

4.2 The Service Provider may terminate this MSA for convenience upon providing
not less than one hundred twenty (120) days prior written notice to the
Company.

================================================================================
5.  FEES AND PAYMENT
================================================================================

5.1 The annual fees under this MSA shall be INR 1,50,00,000 (Rupees One Crore
Fifty Lakhs only), payable in equal quarterly installments.

5.2 Late payment shall attract interest at eighteen percent (18%) per annum.

================================================================================
6.  LIQUIDATED DAMAGES
================================================================================

6.1 In the event of delay in delivery of services beyond the agreed timelines,
the Service Provider shall pay liquidated damages at the rate of INR 50,000
per day of delay, up to a maximum of 10% of the annual contract value.

6.2 The parties agree that the actual damages may be difficult to ascertain
and the liquidated damages represent a genuine pre-estimate of loss.

================================================================================
7.  STAMP DUTY
================================================================================

7.1 This MSA has been executed on stamp paper of INR 100 (Rupees One Hundred
only) purchased in the State of Karnataka.

7.2 The parties agree that the stamp duty paid is sufficient for the purposes
of this Agreement.

================================================================================
8.  GOVERNING LAW AND DISPUTE RESOLUTION
================================================================================

8.1 This MSA shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws
of India.

8.2 Any and all disputes arising out of or in connection with this MSA shall
be finally resolved by arbitration in New Delhi. The arbitration shall be
conducted in the English language.

8.3 The exclusive jurisdiction for all matters arising under this MSA shall
vest solely with the courts in New Delhi, India.

================================================================================
9.  INDEMNIFICATION
================================================================================

9.1 The Service Provider shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Company
from and against any and all claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and
expenses arising out of any third-party claim related to the services.

9.2 The indemnification obligation shall survive termination of this MSA for
a period of five (5) years.

================================================================================
10. CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES
================================================================================

10.1 Neither party shall be liable to the other for any indirect, incidental,
special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to
loss of profits, loss of business, or loss of data.

10.2 The limitation in Section 10.1 shall not apply to (a) breach of
confidentiality, (b) indemnification obligations, or (c) intentional
misconduct.

================================================================================
11. NOTICES
================================================================================

Any notice required under this MSA shall be in writing and shall be deemed
given when delivered by email with confirmed receipt.

================================================================================

ANNEXURE A: SERVICES DESCRIPTION
The Service Provider shall provide data processing, cloud infrastructure
management, and 24/7 technical support services.

ANNEXURE B: SERVICE LEVEL AGREEMENT
- Uptime commitment: 99.9%
- Response time: 4 hours for critical issues
- Resolution time: 24 hours for critical issues

================================================================================

Page 1 of 4
